---
title: "STSCI 5740 Project Report"
format: pdf
fontsize: 12pt
papersize: a4
linestretch: 1.5
---

## Introduction

This project explores hospital readmission patterns among patients with diabetes, with emphasis on broad trends across patient groups. The analysis is based on the Diabetes 130-US hospitals dataset (1999-2008) from the UCI Machine Learning Repository. For the latest project materials and updates, visit our GitHub repository: [stsci5740-project](https://github.com/kelvinchi02/stsci5740-project).
